message:
Update sync conformance tests for newly implemented primitives

The sync conformance test suite previously had TODOs for RwLock, Barrier,
OnceCell, and Condvar (now Notify) since those primitives hadn't been
implemented yet. Now that they exist, update the test file to:

- Import RwLock, Barrier, OnceCell, Notify, and AtomicBool
- Remove TODO annotations from SYNC-003 through SYNC-007 test descriptions
- Rename SYNC-007 from "Condvar Notification" to "Notify (Condvar-style)
  Notification" to reflect the actual API name

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
